message:
feat(fs): add io_uring support for dir and path operations (bd-3lbt)

Use MkDirAt, UnlinkAt (with AT_REMOVEDIR), RenameAt, and SymlinkAt
opcodes on Linux with io-uring feature. All operations fall back to
spawn_blocking_io on other platforms.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
